name: Baby Doll Carrier for 14" - 16" Dolls - Gigglescape™
description:
Inspire immersive, imaginative play in your child with this Baby Doll Carrier from Gigglescape™. This play set includes a pink carrier featuring an allover dotted pattern plus a pacifier, pacifier clip and plush bunny. Plus, the carrier comes with adjustable straps that can be worn on the front or back for comfortable carrying. Compatible with most 14–16 inch dolls, the set is designed for children ages two and up.

Gigglescape™: Where play starts and discovery never ends.
